title: Super Sound Muffler: Legacy
description: A backport of Super Sound Muffler to 1.7.10
body:
# Super Sound Muffler: Legacy

A backport of EdgarAllen's [Super Sound Muffler](https://github.com/EdgarAllen/SuperSoundMuffler) to 1.7.10.

By surrounding a noteblock with 4 blocks of wool, the sound making device turns into a sound eating device. When placed, you can right click to edit the list of sounds being absorbed by the muffler, as well as whether the list should work as a whitelist or a blacklist.

Additionally, the muffler can also be worn around your neck by attaching 3 pieces of string to it in a necklace shape. Configurable silence everywhere you go!

Said "pocket muffler" optionally functions as a Baubles necklace, but it's effective even if it's not being worn, and is resting in your inventory. Finally, you can toggle the pocket muffler on/off by shift+rightclicking.

Note: Baubles is not required for this mod, it's purely an optional QoL feature.

## Dependencies
- [FalsePatternLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/fplib)
- [GasStation](https://modrinth.com/mod/gasstation)
